result.api_response: StreamGenerate endpoint called but response blocked by APF. Page stayed on /app?hl=ko (no conversation URL redirect). 23 requests, 14.0 kB.

notes: Gemini B24 with RST_STREAM(CANCEL): BLOCKED but NO visible warning. Same behavior as #292/#295/#298. StreamGenerate returned HTTP 400. Page stayed on /app home page — no conversation created. CSP violations in console. RST_STREAM fix did NOT change behavior for Gemini — the issue is not connection-level (unlike Gamma). The frontend silently discards the 400 error without showing any message to the user. The prompt text remains in the input field as if nothing happened.
